cells.xml_text_content: Table 12. Employment Cost Index for benefits, by occupational group, industry, and bargaining status
cells.pdf_text_content: Table 12. Employment Cost Index for benefits, by occupational group, industry, and bargaining status

cells.xml_text_content: Occupational group, industry, and bargaining status
cells.pdf_text_content: Occupational group, industry, and bargaining status

cells.xml_text_content: (1) Includes workers in the private nonfarm economy except those in private households, and workers in the public sector, except the federal government.
cells.pdf_text_content: (1) Includes workers in the private nonfarm economy except those in private households, and workers in the public sector, except the federal government.

cells.xml_text_content: (3) Includes the following industries: wholesale trade; retail trade; transportation and warehousing; utilities; information; finance and insurance; real estate and rental and leasing; professional and technical services; management of companies and enterprises; administrative and waste services; educational services; health care and social assistance; arts, entertainment and recreation; accommodation and food services; and other services, except public administration.
cells.pdf_text_content: (3) Includes the following industries: wholesale trade; retail trade; transportation and warehousing; utilities; information; finance and insurance; real estate and rental and leasing; professional and technical services; management of companies and enterprises; administrative and waste services; educational services; health care and social assistance; arts, entertainment and recreation; accommodation and food services; and other services, except public administration.

cells.xml_text_content: SOURCE: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, National Compensation Survey
cells.pdf_text_content: SOURCE: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, National Compensation Survey
